title: Socialtec
body: ***"The cobbler's children have no shoes" II*** Socialtec, the network economy group I'm part of, has been around for two years, but until a few weeks ago we didn't have our own website, even though we have quite a few [projects](http://www.xarop.com/tag/socialtec/) online. Finally, the website has been launched; the user interface (UI) design as well as the overall brand identity were my responsibility. [www.socialtec.es](http://www.socialtec.es/ "Technology and Strategy at the service of the social web") What do you think? Socialtec is a group of companies that develops projects under a model of collaboration and co-development in the field of social technologies.
